Screen.headline: Good choice. Last step!
Screen.subtitle: Enter your details to confirm your monthly subscription.

PaymentMethodCard.title: Payment Method
PaymentMethodCard.termsNotice: By clicking confirm, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

items.title: Free Tutor Replacement
items.subtitle: Not happy with your first lesson? We'll replace your tutor for free.

items.title: Secure SSL Encryption
items.subtitle: Your data is protected by industry-standard 256-bit SSL encryption.

PlanPicker.title: Choose your monthly plan
PlanPicker.subtitle: Seven standard plans (1–7 sessions per week, 60 minutes each). Monthly price = trial lesson price (one 60-minute session) × sessions per week × 4 weeks.
PlanPicker.loginDescription: You need to be signed in to view plans and subscribe.
PlanPicker.notEligibleTrial: Complete your trial lesson with successful payment first.
PlanPicker.notEligibleNoTrialPrice: This tutor has not set a trial lesson price yet.
PlanPicker.notEligibleEnrolled: You already have a pending or active subscription with this tutor.
PlanPicker.notEligibleGeneric: You are not eligible to subscribe right now.

SchedulePicker.title: Pick your weekly schedule
SchedulePicker.pickCount: Select exactly {n} one-hour slots for the week.
SchedulePicker.noPlansForTutor: No subscription plans for this tutor.
SchedulePicker.lockedDescription: Sign in and complete your trial to pick a schedule.
SchedulePicker.selectedHint: Choose slots on the calendar. Remove any here before submitting.

subscriptionSuccess.headline: Thank you for your payment
subscriptionSuccess.subheadline: Your monthly plan is confirmed once payment succeeds. You can review details below.
subscriptionSuccess.notFound: We could not find this subscription.
subscriptionSuccess.errorDescription: Please try again or return to the tutor list.
subscriptionSuccess.unauthorizedDescription: Sign in with the same account you used to subscribe to view this page.
subscriptionSuccess.unauthorizedDescriptionShort: Sign in with the same account you used to subscribe.
subscriptionSuccess.pendingPaymentHint: Payment is still processing. Refresh this page in a moment if it does not update.

TutorPlansEditor.title: Subscription plans
TutorPlansEditor.notTutor: Only tutors can access this page.
TutorPlansEditor.baseCurrencyHint: Amounts use your trial-lesson base currency from your profile: {currency}.
TutorPlansEditor.needTrialPriceDescription: Configure your trial lesson price (and base currency) in your tutor profile before managing subscription plans.
TutorPlansEditor.noPlansYet: No plans yet. Add one below.
